title: Keto Creamy Earth Tomato Pasta
description: A creamy, keto-friendly Italian pasta dish made with fresh earthy flavors and rich tomato sauce. Serve as a satisfying dinner option.

ingredients.name: keto pasta (zucchini noodles or shirataki noodles)

instructions: 1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the keto pasta according to package instructions.
2. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
3. Add the homemade or store-bought tomato sauce to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and olive oil.
4. Reduce heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and a pinch of salt until smooth.
6. Add the whisked cream to the tomato sauce and stir to combine.
7. Remove the cooked keto pasta from the water and add it to the skillet with the tomato sauce and cream.
8. Toss the pasta in the sauce until well coated, then top with grated parmesan cheese and chopped fresh basil.
9. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
11. Garnish with additional parmesan cheese and basil leaves, if desired.
